description: Generic audio resource record aligned with the TDWG Audiovisual Core standard (http://www.tdwg.org/standards/638). Represents a single audio recording (field recording, soundscape, species call) with its technical metadata. Links to a dwc.occurrence as evidence and optionally to an ac.deployment describing the recording device setup. Does not carry location, weather, habitat, or device fields — those belong on dwc.event, dwc.occurrence, or ac.deployment respectively.

main.description: An audio recording record with technical metadata and optional links to occurrence, deployment, and site records.

name.description: A short human-readable name or label for this audio recording.

description.description: A longer human-readable description of the audio recording content.

blob.description: The audio file blob stored on the PDS.

metadata.description: Technical audio metadata (codec, sample rate, duration, frequency bounds, etc.).

spectrogram.description: Spectrogram image of the recording (visual frequency-time representation).

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail image for display in list views.

license.description: License for this recording (e.g., CC-BY-4.0, CC0-1.0). Aligns with AC dcterms:rights.

recordedBy.description: Name of the person or agent who made the recording. Aligns with AC dc:creator. For automated deployments, this is the person who deployed the device.

tags.description: Freeform tags for the recording (e.g., 'dawn-chorus', 'rain', 'chainsaw', 'anthropogenic-noise'). Aligns with AC ac:tag.

occurrenceRef.description: AT-URI of the dwc.occurrence record this audio is evidence for. Use when this recording documents a specific species detection or biodiversity observation.

deploymentRef.description: AT-URI of the ac.deployment record describing the recording device setup (device model, gain, location, schedule, etc.).

siteRef.description: AT-URI of the organization site record where this audio was captured.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of record creation in the ATProto PDS.

metadata.description: Technical audio metadata. These are properties of the audio file itself, not the recording context (location, weather, device). Aligns with AC Resource Creation Vocabulary and Music Ontology terms.

channels.description: Number of audio channels (1 = mono, 2 = stereo).

duration.description: Duration of the recording in seconds (e.g., '300.0').

sampleRate.description: Sample rate in Hz (e.g., 44100, 48000, 384000 for ultrasonic). Aligns with AC mo:sample_rate.

recordedAt.description: Date and time the audio was captured (start of recording). Aligns with AC xmp:CreateDate.

fileFormat.description: File format (e.g., 'WAV', 'FLAC', 'MP3'). Aligns with AC dc:format.

minFrequencyHz.description: Lowest frequency present in the recording in Hz. Aligns with AC ac:freqLow.

maxFrequencyHz.description: Highest frequency present in the recording in Hz. Aligns with AC ac:freqHigh.

filterHighPassHz.description: High-pass filter cutoff frequency in Hz applied during or after recording. Aligns with AC ac:filterHighPass.

filterLowPassHz.description: Low-pass filter cutoff frequency in Hz applied during or after recording. Aligns with AC ac:filterLowPass.
